name: @ai-sdk/perplexity
description: The **[Perplexity provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/perplexity)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for Perplexity's Sonar API - a powerful answer engine with real-time web search capabilities.
